formulas.formula: Trade revenues + Related party revenues = Total Sales and other operating revenues
components: Sales and other operating revenues - Trade
Sales and other operating revenues - Related parties
Sales and other operating revenues - Total
formulas.operation: Sales and other operating revenues - Trade + Sales and other operating revenues - Related parties
formulas.result_label: Sales and other operating revenues - Total

formulas.formula: Cost of sales + Impairments + SGA + RD = Total operating costs and expenses
formulas.operation: Cost of sales + Impairments + Selling, general and administrative expenses + Research and development expenses
formulas.result_label: Total operating costs and expenses

formulas.formula: Total revenues - Total operating costs = Operating income
components: Sales and other operating revenues - Total
formulas.operation: Sales and other operating revenues - Total - Total operating costs and expenses
formulas.result_label: Operating income

formulas.formula: Operating income - Interest expense + Interest income + Gain on sale + Other = Income before equity and taxes
components: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes
formulas.operation: Operating income - Interest expense + Interest income + Gain on sale of business + Other income (expense), net
formulas.result_label: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes

formulas.formula: Income before equity and taxes + Equity earnings = Income before taxes
components: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes
Income from continuing operations before income taxes
formulas.operation: Income from continuing operations before equity investments and income taxes + (Loss) income from equity investments
formulas.result_label: Income from continuing operations before income taxes

formulas.formula: Income before taxes - Tax = Income from continuing operations
components: Income from continuing operations before income taxes
formulas.operation: Income from continuing operations before income taxes - Provision for income taxes
formulas.result_label: Income from continuing operations

formulas.formula: Income from continuing + Discontinued = Net income
components: Loss from discontinued operations, net of tax
formulas.operation: Income from continuing operations + Loss from discontinued operations, net of tax
formulas.result_label: Net income

formulas.formula: Net income - Redeemable NCI dividends = Net income to Company shareholders
components: Net income attributable to the Company shareholders
formulas.operation: Net income - Dividends on redeemable non-controlling interests
formulas.result_label: Net income attributable to the Company shareholders

xbrl_not_on_statement.reason: Comprehensive income appears on the Consolidated Statements of Comprehensive Income, not the income statement face
Comprehensive income attributable to Company shareholders appears on Comprehensive Income statement, not income statement
OCI appears on Comprehensive Income statement, not income statement
Financial derivatives OCI component appears on Comprehensive Income statement
Pension OCI component appears on Comprehensive Income statement
Foreign currency translation OCI component appears on Comprehensive Income statement
Revenues concept used in disaggregated revenue note tables; revenue on the income statement face uses RevenueFromContractWithCustomerExcludingAssessedTax

formulas.formula: Cash + Restricted cash + AR Trade + AR Related + Inventories + Prepaid = Total current assets
components: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents + Restricted cash + Accounts receivable - Trade, net + Accounts receivable - Related parties + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.result_label: Total current assets

formulas.formula: PPE gross - Accumulated depreciation = PPE net
formulas.operation: Property, plant and equipment (gross) - Less: Accumulated depreciation
formulas.result_label: Property, plant and equipment, net

formulas.formula: Current assets + Operating lease + PPE net + Equity investments + Goodwill + Intangibles + Other = Total assets
formulas.operation: Total current assets + Operating lease assets + Property, plant and equipment, net + Equity investments + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Other assets
formulas.result_label: Total assets

formulas.formula: Current maturities + Short-term debt + AP Trade + AP Related + Accrued = Total current liabilities
formulas.operation: Current maturities of long-term debt + Short-term debt + Accounts payable - Trade + Accounts payable - Related parties + Accrued and other current liabilities
formulas.result_label: Total current liabilities

formulas.formula: Common stock + APIC + Retained earnings + AOCI - Treasury stock = Total Company shareholders equity
components: Total Company share of shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Ordinary shares + Additional paid-in capital + Retained earnings + Accumulated other comprehensive loss - Treasury stock
formulas.result_label: Total Company share of shareholders equity

formulas.formula: Company equity + NCI = Total equity
components: Total Company share of shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Total Company share of shareholders equity + Non-controlling interests
formulas.result_label: Total equity

formulas.formula: Total current liabilities + LT debt + Operating lease liabilities + Other liabilities + Deferred taxes + Redeemable NCI + Total equity = Total liabilities and equity
components: Total liabilities, redeemable non-controlling interests and equity
formulas.operation: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Operating lease liabilities + Other liabilities + Deferred income taxes + Redeemable non-controlling interests + Total equity
formulas.result_label: Total liabilities, redeemable non-controlling interests and equity

formulas.formula: Total assets = Total liabilities redeemable NCI and equity
components: Total liabilities, redeemable non-controlling interests and equity
formulas.operation: Total assets - Total liabilities, redeemable non-controlling interests and equity
formulas.result_label: Total assets

formulas.formula: Net income + DD&A + Impairments + Amort debt costs + SBC + Equity loss + Distributions + Deferred tax - Gain on sale - AR change - Inventory change + AP change + Other = Net CFO
components: Distributions of earnings, net of tax
Net cash provided by operating activities
formulas.operation: Net income + Depreciation and amortization + Impairments + Amortization of debt-related costs + Share-based compensation - Equity loss (income) + Distributions of earnings, net of tax + Deferred income tax (benefit) provision - Gain on sale of business - Accounts receivable (change) - Inventories (change) + Accounts payable (change) + Other, net (operating)
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by operating activities

formulas.formula: - Capex - Acquisition of equity investments + Proceeds from sale - Other investing = Net CFI
components: Expenditures for property, plant and equipment
Net cash used in investing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds from sale of business - Expenditures for property, plant and equipment - Acquisition of equity method investments - Other, net (investing)
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in investing activities

formulas.formula: - Buybacks - Dividends + LT debt issuance - Debt issuance costs - Repayment + Commercial paper + Proceeds hedges - Payments hedges + Other financing = Net CFF
components: Proceeds from settlement of cash flow hedges
Payments from settlement of cash flow hedges
Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.operation: Issuance of long-term debt + Net repayments of commercial paper + Proceeds from settlement of cash flow hedges + Other, net (financing) - Repurchases of Company ordinary shares - Dividends paid - common stock - Payments of debt issuance costs - Repayment of long-term debt - Payments from settlement of cash flow hedges
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in financing activities

formulas.formula: CFO + CFI + CFF + FX = Net change in cash
components: Net cash provided by operating activities
Net cash used in investing activities
Net cash used in financing activities
Effect of exchange rate changes on cash
(Decrease) increase in cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash
formulas.operation: Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash used in investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities + Effect of exchange rate changes on cash
formulas.result_label: (Decrease) increase in cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash

formulas.formula: Beginning cash + Net change = Ending cash
components: Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash at beginning of period
(Decrease) increase in cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash
Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash at end of period
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash at beginning of period + (Decrease) increase in cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash
formulas.result_label: Cash and cash equivalents and restricted cash at end of period

accounts_receivable.detail: Trade AR net of allowance (nonrelated party) = 3855, Related party AR = 207, Total = 4062. Note 4 discloses allowance for credit losses of 5M at June 30 2024. Pure trade AR to third parties net = 3855.

Gross interest expense = 247M tagged as InterestExpenseOperating. No further breakdown of gross interest in notes within available data.

tax_rate.note: Effective rate 21.0% for H1 2024 per XBRL fact EffectiveIncomeTaxRateContinuingOperations. Pretax income is positive. Tax expense is positive. No flags required.

inventory.note: Inventory breakdown from Note 5: Finished goods 3317, Work-in-process 180, Raw materials and supplies 1576, Total 5073 at June 30 2024

formula_checks.formula: Trade revenues + Related party revenues = Total Sales and other operating revenues
Cost of sales + Impairments + SGA + RD = Total operating costs and expenses
Total revenues - Total operating costs = Operating income
Operating income - Interest expense + Interest income + Gain on sale + Other = Income before equity and taxes
Income before equity and taxes + Equity earnings = Income before taxes
Income before taxes - Tax = Income from continuing operations
Income from continuing + Discontinued = Net income
Net income - Redeemable NCI dividends = Net income to Company shareholders
Cash + Restricted cash + AR Trade + AR Related + Inventories + Prepaid = Total current assets
PPE gross - Accumulated depreciation = PPE net
Current assets + Operating lease + PPE net + Equity investments + Goodwill + Intangibles + Other = Total assets
Current maturities + Short-term debt + AP Trade + AP Related + Accrued = Total current liabilities
Common stock + APIC + Retained earnings + AOCI - Treasury stock = Total Company shareholders equity
Company equity + NCI = Total equity
Total current liabilities + LT debt + Operating lease liabilities + Other liabilities + Deferred taxes + Redeemable NCI + Total equity = Total liabilities and equity
Total assets = Total liabilities redeemable NCI and equity
Net income + DD&A + Impairments + Amort debt costs + SBC + Equity loss + Distributions + Deferred tax - Gain on sale - AR change - Inventory change + AP change + Other = Net CFO
- Capex - Acquisition of equity investments + Proceeds from sale - Other investing = Net CFI
- Buybacks - Dividends + LT debt issuance - Debt issuance costs - Repayment + Commercial paper + Proceeds hedges - Payments hedges + Other financing = Net CFF
CFO + CFI + CFF + FX = Net change in cash
Beginning cash + Net change = Ending cash
